scripts.setup:
npm install && npm run build --workspace=shared && echo '
Setup complete! Next steps:
1) Create .env files
2) Run npm run init:backend to initialize Supabase
3) Run npm run dev to start the frontend'
scripts.dev:prod: NODE_ENV=production cd frontend && npx next dev
scripts.dev:all: npm run supabase:local && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && cd frontend && npx next build
scripts.gen:types: cd backend && npx supabase gen types typescript --local > ../shared/types/supabase.ts
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && npx supabase db reset
